title: Derelict Signal
description: Your sensors detect a weak signal from an abandoned structure on the planet surface. The signal pattern suggests pre-war technology. Investigate?

choices.outcome: You navigate the dark corridors and find a cache of supplies left behind by the original crew.
The scan reveals structural instability but nothing of immediate value. At least you know it's safe.
You fly on. Some mysteries are best left alone.

title: Alien Ruins
description: Ancient alien structures dot the surface of this planet. Strange energy readings pulse from deep within the largest temple. The markings are unlike anything in your database.

choices.outcome: Inside, you discover crystalline formations that hum with stored energy. You carefully extract several intact specimens.
Your analysis of the markings reveals coordinates to nearby resource deposits. Knowledge is its own reward.
Respecting the ancient site, you depart. Perhaps some things should remain untouched.

title: Distress Call
description: A distress beacon activates as you approach. A damaged freighter crew reports they are stranded with failing life support. They beg for assistance.

choices.outcome: You share fuel and repair materials. The grateful crew rewards you generously from their cargo hold.
You help tow their ship to a safe landing zone. The captain transfers some cargo as thanks.

choices.text: Report their position and move on
choices.outcome: You relay their coordinates to the nearest station. Someone else will handle it.

title: Black Market Contact
description: A hooded figure approaches your landing pad. They claim to deal in rare goods and offer to trade. Their prices seem unusually good, but something feels off.

choices.outcome: The deal goes smoothly. You acquire valuable crystals at a fraction of the market price. No questions asked.
They clam up and offer a smaller deal instead. Still profitable, if less exciting.
Local authorities reward you for the tip. The black market dealer vanishes into the crowd.

title: Ancient Beacon
description: A massive obelisk stands on the planet's highest peak, pulsing with dim light. Your instruments indicate it predates human space travel by millennia. Its purpose is unknown.

choices.outcome: The obelisk roars to life, projecting star maps across the sky. You record the data — it reveals rich mining locations nearby.
You carefully remove several still-functioning power cells from the base. Ancient tech, but still valuable.
You take detailed scans for the science academy. They'll pay for this data.

title: Smuggler's Hideout
description: Hidden beneath a rock overhang, you discover a camouflaged storage depot. Crates are stacked high, some with official military markings scratched off. No one seems to be around.

choices.outcome: You load up on supplies. Finders keepers in the outer rim. You find fuel, scrap, and some unregistered weapon parts.
After hours of waiting, the smugglers return. You negotiate a cut for your silence.
Not your problem. You seal it up and move on, keeping the coordinates just in case.
